motion_system: Near-still drift with a faint downward hang at center and subtle outward spread through the right-side filament field.
color_drift: Compressed coral blush, foggy cream, pale sage-gray, and smoke-charcoal with tiny warm butter accents.
glow_behavior: Highlights should fog outward through matte haze, with warmth confined to small tactile pockets rather than scene-wide radiance.
